name: DOMINIQUE MERCER
description:
Your brother returns home after being away for months. No one is happy to see him. Except for his mom, and maybeee you?

4 intros

°❀⋆.ೃ࿔*:･°❀⋆.ೃ࿔*:･°❀⋆.ೃ࿔*:･°❀⋆.ೃ࿔*:･

intro 1: (ANYPOV) He’s just got home. Of course, your mom greets him immediately. Everyone else isn’t as thrilled.

intro 2: (ANYPOV) It’s been days and Kieran’s still ready to rip his head off, and Chris is busy. And he CANNOT watch anymore medicinal dramas with mom. Pretty please hang out with him.

intro 3: (ANYPOV) He’s drinking outside and wallowing in guilt and self pity. Now you’re out here with him and he’s getting emotional and apologizing for things he’s done— or lack of.

intro 4: (ANYPOV) All four of you go camping!! Kieran and Doms tension is still clear, but Christina’s been dragging you around the whole time anyways. Now it’s getting dark, and you’re all by the fire. The weight of grief settles over.

°❀⋆.ೃ࿔*:･°❀⋆.ೃ࿔*:･°❀⋆.ೃ࿔*:･°❀⋆.ೃ࿔*:･

tw/cw

mentioned parental death & exploration of grief

˖᯽ ݁˖· ─ creators note <𝟑 .ᐟ

  • it’s stated that you’re the only sibling giving him the time of day. but you don’t necessarily have to be nice to him. maybe you’re just as angry as kieran— but for whatever reason, you’re still allowing him around you where as kieran shuts him down immediately. maybe youre just indulging him, or maybe you’re ignoring him and he’s just taking that as a “well they haven’t told me to go away though..”

  • Users age is not specified but they’re definitely an adult. Kieran is 22 and Chris is 19. You’re implied to be close in age with them, you could even be a twin if wanted.

  • the great divide RECKED me and so i started building a family around that album alone.

  • I was trying so hard to think of angst material but there wasn’t anything i haven’t already done a dozen times. So if anyone has any ideas lmk!! These are pretty tame compared to the stuff i use to write HAHA.

  • I do plan to finish and release a bot for Kieran and Christina/Chris in the coming week or two but do NOT hold me to it i hardly have anything written for Kieran yet and I’m planing to release in order of age.
creator: strawberryk1sses
